title: PokeSnackSpeedup
description: speeds up the super slow pokesnack spawn rate in cobblemon!
body: This mod speeds up pokesnack (new block added in the 1.7 update) spawn rates in cobblemon! These blocks have the potential to increase shiny rates but spawn wayyyy to slowly. I've never really made a mod before and want it up on an aternos server. Hope you guys Enjoy!
